title: Medical disclaimer
description: Clinical scope of the website, support, and chatbot.
heading: Medical disclaimer
summary: The public website informs and guides, but it does not replace professional evaluation or final diagnosis.

highlights.title: The website helps define the next step, not diagnose.
highlights.body: Services, telemedicine, and editorial support move the funnel, but they do not replace medical judgement.

highlights.title: Acute cases require immediate attention outside the website.
highlights.body: Do not depend on the form or chatbot during an emergency.

sections.title: Content limits
sections.body: Editorial and automated content does not replace individual medical judgement.
items: It is not a prescription or final recommendation.
It does not guarantee eligibility for a procedure.
It does not replace physical examination when needed.

sections.title: When to escalate
sections.body: Intense pain, bleeding, or rapid progression require immediate attention through the right channel.
items: Do not wait for an async website response.
Book follow-up once the acute event is controlled.
